understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid while avoiding spike tiles 'u'/'v' that end the run immediately.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only via MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after each move, automatic gravity fall occurs until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks (requires target_position). Falls follow gravity direction (y increases downward when gravity is up). Each attempt has a 50-turn limit; failure restarts the level. UNDO reverts the previous action.
